summary: Phase 47 (AI Concierge + Behavioral Security Guard) fully tested. Backend: 17/17 pytest cases pass — security config CRUD, security events feed, concierge public settings, legit chat (Claude Sonnet 4.5 live), prompt-injection block, sensitive-data block, escalation trigger, role-isolation (specialist), admin-cannot-chat (400), admin conversations list/detail, stats, settings update, block/unblock user, admin_ai_findings mirror. Frontend: client bubble (concierge-bubble-launch) mounts and opens panel (concierge-bubble-panel) with role-specific suggestions + send/reset/close + support-contact CTA. Admin sees no bubble; AdminLayoutMetronic exposes 'Concierge & Security' (admin-nav-concierge) which renders AdminConciergePanel with SecurityConfig (security-save), Events feed (security-events-list), Conversations (conversations-list), Settings (concierge-settings-save). Live config edit + save verified in UI.

integration_issues.issue: Playwright default User-Agent contains 'HeadlessChrome' which security_guard.BOT_UA_REGEX correctly classifies as 'bot_ua' → 403 'Acces blocat: client neacceptat.' This is EXPECTED behavior, not a bug. Real browsers send Mozilla UAs without 'Headless' and pass. Backend pytest validates legitimate chat with a real-browser UA header (200 OK).

critical_code_review_comments: security_guard.BOT_UA_REGEX correctly blocks HeadlessChrome — consider a separate 'allow_headless_for_testing' toggle if E2E from cloud preview is desired, but for production this is correct.
concierge.py is 563 lines — borderline; OK for MVP but could be split into concierge_chat.py + concierge_admin.py once next features land.
_log_event stores 'user_agent' but composite_key only includes (kind, ip) — repeated bots from same IP coalesce nicely; consider TTL index on security_events for self-cleanup at high volume.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (admin full, client bubble mounts/opens; live LLM send blocked only by intentional bot-guard against HeadlessChrome UA)

test_credentials: admin@propmanage.io / Admin123!  ·  client@propmanage.io / Client123!  ·  specialist@propmanage.io / Spec123!
seed_data_creation: Test created concierge messages + security events as part of pytest run. Set rate_limit_per_minute=50, concierge_msgs_per_hour=30, concierge_msgs_per_day=250, vpn_block_enabled=false in admin_security_config (intentional for E2E).
context_for_next_testing_agent: For backend curl always send Mozilla UA AND first PUT /api/admin/security/config {"vpn_block_enabled": false} as admin. For Playwright E2E of concierge SEND flow, override browser context with a non-Headless UA, e.g. browser.new_context(user_agent='Mozilla/5.0 ... Chrome/120 ... Safari/537.36') — Chromium default contains 'HeadlessChrome' which the bot guard correctly blocks. Bubble visibility/open/admin panel all work without that workaround.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found. The single observed 403 in Playwright client chat is a true positive from the behavioral security guard (HeadlessChrome bot UA), confirming the feature works as designed.
